headline: A Look At CF Industries (CF) Valuation After Strong Rally And Nitrogen Market Tailwinds
summary: CF Industries Holdings (CF) has drawn fresh attention after filing a definitive proxy statement on March 17, urging shareholders to vote against a proposal that would tighten oversight of senior executives’ severance packages. See our latest analysis for CF Industries Holdings. Despite a 0.5% 1 day share price decline and a 3.6% 7 day share price pullback to US$124.90, CF Industries still shows strong momentum with a 30.4% 30 day share price return and a 66.5% 1 year total shareholder return,...
